afterSnapshot.name: computeSeaStatus
afterSnapshot.purpose: Compute an overall sea safety score from weather conditions, returning a 4-tier level (green/yellow/red/black) with reasons.

context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: The app needs a direction-agnostic global indicator that answers "should I be on the water at all?" based on aggregated weather factors.
implementation: Score starts at 100 and deducts penalties for each dangerous factor. Instant-black triggers for storm-force winds (>40kn) or very rough seas (>5m). Graduated penalties for wind speed, gust factor, wave height, precipitation, and low pressure. Thresholds map score to 4 tiers with human-readable labels and a reasons array explaining each penalty.
